name: kbridge-slider-crank-differential
description: Phase B of the trust-chain plan (KinematicBridge/docs/progress/2026-06-09-trust-chain-next-phases.md): the MOTION DIFFERENTIAL. One canvas, two motion layers at doc=cm: ORANGE = KinematicImporter Animate(Time) replaying Inventor's recorded motion (untouched, world-absolute, cm-native); GREEN = the same Inventor geometry bound to the bridge-translated .kin.json and driven by CPig's own Sweep of the EMITTED driver (joint_1, 0->170 deg, no node overrides — B-bug-011), reframed mm->cm (Scale x0.1 about origin) then placed into Inventor world by the ground occurrence's transform taken from the importer's own Names+Transforms outputs (the importer layer is never moved). Operator protocol: scrub Time and Step together — orange and green should move through the same positions. KNOWN OPEN ITEM: the CPig driver direction is unsigned (B-bug-011); if green mirrors orange, the driver sign needs flipping — report it as the Phase-B finding. Requires KinematicImporter .gha + current CPig .gha. Capture-only screenshots; asserts = SlopSuccess + Converged + bind files found. Slop: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/slider-crank-differential.canary.slop.json.

setup.vlmDescription: Two copies of the same slider-crank mechanism (base rail, crank, connecting rod, slider plate) overlaid in one viewport at the same scale and position: one tinted orange, one tinted green, plus a faint blue rest copy. At Time=0 and Step=0 the orange and green copies should coincide.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: Both motion layers at rest (Time=0, Step=0): orange recorded + green solved coinciding on the faint rest copy.

checkpoints.name: front
checkpoints.description: Front view of the coinciding layers at rest.
